headline: Can Celsius Holdings Sustain the 55% International Sales Growth?
summary: CELH's overseas business expands from a smaller base, with revenues up 55%, a Spain launch through Suntory and Portugal next in its Europe push.

raw.headline: Can Celsius Holdings Sustain the 55% International Sales Growth?
raw.summary: CELH's overseas business expands from a smaller base, with revenues up 55%, a Spain launch through Suntory and Portugal next in its Europe push.

headline: Trump Rolls Out $500 Million Lifeline for Smaller Meatpackers as Beeflation Spirals Out of Control — But Tyson Foods and Other Industry Giants Are Left Out
summary: Trump administration's $500 million meatpacker aid excludes Tyson Foods and JBS, targeting smaller beef processors instead.

raw.headline: Trump Rolls Out $500 Million Lifeline for Smaller Meatpackers as Beeflation Spirals Out of Control — But Tyson Foods and Other Industry Giants Are Left Out
raw.summary: Trump administration's $500 million meatpacker aid excludes Tyson Foods and JBS, targeting smaller beef processors instead.
